enabled.label: Enabled
enabled.help: Enable or disable the OpenViking session bridge (default: false)

baseUrl.label: OpenViking Base URL
baseUrl.help: HTTP URL of the running OpenViking server

apiKey.label: OpenViking API Key
apiKey.help: Optional API key for OpenViking server

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Agent identifier sent to OpenViking (X-OpenViking-Agent header)

flushTimeoutMs.label: Flush Timeout (ms)
flushTimeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait for a synchronous flush (e.g. /done command)

commitOnFlush.label: Commit On Flush
commitOnFlush.help: Commit (extract memories from) the OV session at session_end. Default: true
